heading: Purpose
label: 12331 Purpose
text: It is the purpose of this part to encourage and assist State and local agencies to coordinate resources, reduce barriers to services, and develop new capacities to ensure that State and community services designed to serve children, youth, and families are more effective and comprehensive.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1990 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 1990section 1001(a) of Pub. L. 101–501section 8621 of this title
